message: ci: pin zig for forwarder builds

files.patch:
@@ -41,6 +41,11 @@ jobs:
       with:
         version: 10
         run_install: false
+
+    - name: Setup Zig
+      uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
+      with:
+        version: 0.15.2
     
     - name: Cache Homebrew packages
       uses: actions/cache@v4
@@ -90,7 +95,7 @@ jobs:
           
           # Install tools without updating Homebrew
           # brew install automatically upgrades if already installed
-          if brew install swiftlint swiftformat xcbeautify jq zig; then
+          if brew install swiftlint swiftformat xcbeautify jq; then
             echo "Successfully installed/upgraded all tools"
             break
           else

@@ -14,7 +14,7 @@ permissions:
 jobs:
   release-build-test:
     name: Build and Test Release Configuration
-    runs-on: [self-hosted, macOS, ARM64]
+    runs-on: macos-latest
     timeout-minutes: 60
     
     steps:
@@ -41,8 +41,13 @@ jobs:
     - name: Setup pnpm
       uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
       with:
-        version: 9
+        version: 10
         dest: ~/pnpm-${{ github.run_id }}
+
+    - name: Setup Zig
+      uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
+      with:
+        version: 0.15.2
     
     - name: Cache Homebrew packages
       uses: actions/cache@v4
@@ -75,7 +80,7 @@ jobs:
           fi
           
           # Update Homebrew and install all tools in one command
-          if brew update && brew install swiftlint swiftformat xcbeautify zig; then
+          if brew update && brew install swiftlint swiftformat xcbeautify; then
             echo "Successfully installed/upgraded all tools"
             break
           else

@@ -38,7 +38,7 @@ jobs:
     - name: Setup Zig
       uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
       with:
-        version: latest
+        version: 0.15.2
 
     - name: Cache TypeScript build info
       uses: useblacksmith/cache@v5
